title: TabFaces
body:
# TabFaces mod for Minecraft Forge 1.7.10 ![logo](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/logo_small.png) Display player faces in the server tab menu, in the chat, and the server population info tooltip. [![hub](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/badges/github.png)](https://github.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/releases) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/badges/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tabfaces) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/badges/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tabfaces) [![67](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/badges/67.png)](https://67.fentanylsolutions.org/mod/tabfaces) [![maven](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/badges/maven.png)](https://maven.fentanylsolutions.org/#/releases/org/fentanylsolutions/tabfaces/TabFaces) ![forge](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/badges/forge.png) [![cord](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/badges/cord.png)](https://discord.gg/xAWCqGrguG) ![screeenshot1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/screenshot1.png) ![screeenshot3](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/screenshot3.png) ![screeenshot4](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/screenshot4.png) ## Dependencies * As of version 1.0.2, [UniMixins](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/unimixins) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/unimixins/versions) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/LegacyModdingMC/UniMixins/releases) is a required dependency. * Prior to version 1.0.10, [CarbonConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/carbon-config) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/carbon-config) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/carbon-config) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/Carbon-Config-Project/CarbonConfig) is a required dependency. * As of version 1.0.9, [SkinPort](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/skinport) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/skinport) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/zlainsama/SkinPort) is an optional dependency and has added compat. * As of version 1.0.16, [FentLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fentlib) [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fentlib) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fentlib) [![67](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/67.png)](https://67.fentanylsolutions.org/mod/fentlib) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/JackOfNoneTrades/FentLib) is an optional dependency and provides modern + HD skin compat. ## Incompatibilities * Better Ping Display is not compatible. ## FAQ ### What does this mod do? * Player faces in the tab menu backport. * Player faces in the server selection menu (`1.0.2`). * Player faces in the chat (`1.0.5`). * Player faces in TabbyChat [![tc_git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/tabbychat-unofficial) [![tc_git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/mist475/tabbychat/releases) (`1.0.7`). Since `1.0.8` TabbyChat specific configs can be changed from the TabbyChat GUI as well. ### Client? Server? Which side? * As of version `1.0.2`, client only, will do nothing on the server. * As of version `1.0.8`, server is required for GT:NH ServerUtilities [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/serverutilities-gtnh) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/GTNewHorizons/ServerUtilities) compat. ### Will this work with [insert auth mod]? It should work on all online servers. Tested on a clean server and one treated with [authlib-injector](https://github.com/yushijinhun/authlib-injector). Has compatibility with Wawel Auth [![curse](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/curse.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/wawel-auth) [![modrinth](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/modrinth.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/wawel-auth) [![67](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/67.png)](https://67.fentanylsolutions.org/mod/wawel-auth) [![git](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/icons/git.png)](https://github.com/JackOfNoneTrades/WawelAuth) as well. ### Misc If you use the debug config to add a team to all members (to test width handling), remove that team with the `tabfaces_dbg_cleanup` command. This command is registered only if both, server and client have the debug config set to `true`. ### Building `./gradlew build`. ## License `LGPLv3`. ## Buy me a coffee * [ko-fi.com](https://ko-fi.com/jackisasubtlejoke) * Monero: `893tQ56jWt7czBsqAGPq8J5BDnYVCg2tvKpvwTcMY1LS79iDabopdxoUzNLEZtRTH4ewAcKLJ4DM4V41fvrJGHgeKArxwmJ`
![license](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/JackOfNoneTrades/TabFaces/master/images/license_small.png)
